text:
is a mook published by JTB Publishing on 06 July 2022 for 1430 yen (10% tax included). It is a collaboration with RURUBU and Evangelion. https://jtbpublishing.co.jp/topics/CL000470 

Overview

It a sightseeing guidebook that allows you to enjoy Hamamatsu, Hakone, and Ube, which are one of Evangelion's model locations, from the perspective of Evangelion fans. In addition to introducing the Tokyo-3, Village-3, and Ube Shinkawa Station that appeared in the movie from the unique perspective of RURUBU, there are also fantasy travel plans for Hamamatsu x Rei, Hakone x Asuka, and Ube x Mari. In addition to the standard sightseeing spots in Hamamatsu, Hakone, and Ube, we will also introduce spots that Evangelion fans cannot miss. https://www.eva-info.jp/16821
